AvailabilityChecker.availableMessage: {availableCount} of {totalCount} campsites are available for these dates.
AvailabilityChecker.limitedMessage: Only {availableCount} of {totalCount} campsites are available for these dates.

BookingValidation.checkOutLater: Check-out date must be later than check-in date

HomePage.metaDescription: Discover Omborokko Safaris, a remote Namibian bush campsite with mountain views, warm showers, flush toilets, and easy online booking requests.
HomePage.structuredDescription: Remote bush camping in Namibia with warm showers, flush toilets, drinking water, and mountain views.
HomePage.heroTitle: Remote camping at the foot of the Omborokko Mountains
HomePage.heroBody: Set on a vast, wildlife-rich cattle farm, Omborokko Safaris offers remote camping, open skies, and quiet evenings by the fire.
HomePage.aboutTitle: Off the Grid, With Essential Comforts
HomePage.aboutDescription: Our remote campsite provides a unique chance to dwell in the midst of Namibia's untouched beauty. Located next to a seasonal river far from any other infrastructure, the campsite offers a genuine encounter with the tranquil Namibian bush.

highlights.amenitiesText: Warm showers, flush toilets, drinking water, and a pool nearby.
highlights.settingText: Seasonal riverbeds, mountain views, and a short hiking trail to the water hole.
highlights.campingText: Firepit cooking, starlit dinners, and a simple base for a proper bush stay.
highlights.overlandersText: Cash onsite, straightforward arrivals, and a clear request-and-confirm booking flow.

HomePage.notesDescription: A few practical details to know before you head out into the bush.
HomePage.bookingTitle: Check your dates before you book
HomePage.testimonialsTitle: What guests say about the campsite
HomePage.directionsDescription: Please follow the road signs to reception at the farmhouse on arrival. From there, you will receive directions to the campsite, which is a further 5 km away.
HomePage.bookingProcessDescription: A simple request-and-confirm flow so you know what happens after you choose your dates.

steps.requestTitle: Check your dates and submit your booking request online.
steps.requestText: Choose your stay dates, guest count, and contact details so the team can review availability.
steps.confirmTitle: Each request is reviewed before it becomes a confirmed booking.
steps.confirmText: You will receive a confirmation email as soon as your requested dates have been checked by the team.
steps.arriveTitle: Head to reception first, then continue on to the campsite.
steps.arriveText: Follow the road signs to the farmhouse on arrival. From there, you will receive directions to the campsite, which is a further 5 km away.

testimonials.oneQuote: A beautiful place integrated into nature, well equipped, and far from any buildings.
testimonials.twoQuote: The facilities were immaculate, very well thought out, peaceful, and secluded.
testimonials.threeQuote: A fabulous wild campsite beside a dry river bed with spotlessly clean facilities and lovely owners.

BookPage.metaDescription: Request your campsite stay at Omborokko Safaris. Check practical details, review pricing, and send your preferred dates for confirmation.
BookPage.title: Request your bush campsite stay

BookingSuccessPage.metaDescription: Your booking request has been received.
BookingSuccessPage.title: Thanks for your booking request!
BookingSuccessPage.body: We will review availability and confirm the stay as soon as possible. You will receive a confirmation email once your booking is confirmed.
